title: pogonospermum eriniae
intro: Pogonospermum eriniae is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is commonly known as Erin's button fern or False Button Fern due to its unique button-like spores. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The leaves and stems of Pogonospermum eriniae can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to have health benefits including reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing.
